description:
Perform a network analysis on the 'demodb' graph database (User: admin, Pass: admin) accessible at http://localhost:2480. Gather statistics and create a report file at '/home/ga/graph_analysis_report.txt' containing exactly five lines with the following keys and their integer results:

TOTAL_VERTICES: <count of all vertices>
TOTAL_EDGES: <count of all edges>
FIVE_STAR_HOTELS: <count of Hotels with 5 Stars>
HOTEL_COUNTRIES: <count of distinct countries where Hotels are located>
LUCA_NETWORK_SIZE: <count of distinct Profiles reachable from 'luca.rossi@example.com' via outgoing 'HasFriend' edges with a maximum depth of 2, including Luca himself>
